response:

Tesla is going bankrupt tomorrow - the news is confirmed by the board of directors - the company is in critical financial trouble - the stock price is dropping rapidly - investors are panicking

Elon Musk has announced the bad news - he is the CEO of Tesla - the company is facing a crisis - the financial reports show severe losses - the market is reacting negatively

Section 3  
The situation is worsening - the debt is mounting - the cash reserves are dwindling - the company is struggling to meet obligations - the future looks uncertain

Section 4  
Musk is taking urgent action - he is working on a solution - the team is under pressure - the public is watching closely - the outcome is unclear

Section 5  
The world is watching - the stock is falling - the future of Tesla is in question - the company is at a critical crossroads - the fate of the company is in the hands of Musk
